source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/02_ADD (HAD1417MCW)/▶ CE MDD/■ 10. TCF_ADD(HAD1417MCW) 230215 (Rev.5) - Label Update/Attachment 04. Risk Management Report/04-03. Basic Safety, Essential Performance Report (Doc.No.A-TCF-5-048).docx

document.title: Basic Safety, Essential Performance Report for ADD Digital flat panel X-ray detector

sourceSummary.oneLine: Report defining basic safety, essential performance, EMC monitoring criteria, and pass results for the ADD digital flat panel X-ray detector.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports risk management and technical documentation by recording basic safety and essential performance criteria and EMC test pass/fail outcomes.
keyPoints: Operation check of the product can be monitored by acquisition software.
Acquisition image is obtained as intended and should not have two adjacent lines or be blank.
DC power is consistently supplied from POWER SUPPLY when EMC test is performed.
CISPR 11 and IEC 61000 series EMC tests are recorded as PASS.
Specific immunity pass/fail criteria shall be included in the risk management file.

evidence.claim: The document is a Basic Safety and Essential Performance Report for the ADD digital flat panel X-ray detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Basic Safety, Essential Performance Report for ADD Digital flat panel X-ray detector

evidence.claim: The report number and revision are A-TCF-5-048 (Rev.1).
evidence.evidenceText: Report No.: A-TCF-5-048 (Rev.1)

evidence.claim: The document date associated with preparation, review, and approval is APR/02/2021.
evidence.evidenceText: Prepared R&D team Jung, Woosuk APR/02/2021 Review R&D Manager Lee, Dong jin APR/02/2021 Approval Quality Manager Hur Namkyu APR/02/2021

evidence.claim: Revision 0 was established on MAY/10/2020 and revision 1 on APR/02/2021 revised the product name.
evidence.evidenceText: 0 MAY/10/2020 Establishment 1 APR/02/2021 Revise the product name

evidence.claim: The operation check can be monitored using acquisition software.
evidence.evidenceText: Operation check of the product can be monitored by using the acquisition software.

evidence.claim: Essential performance criteria include intended image acquisition and no adjacent two lines or blank acquired image.
evidence.evidenceText: Acquisition image is obtained as intended. The acquired image should not have two lines adjacent or be blank.

evidence.claim: The product should operate normally when operation is required.
evidence.evidenceText: Operation normally when operation is required.

evidence.claim: DC power must be consistently supplied from the power supply during EMC testing.
evidence.evidenceText: DC power is consistently supplied from POWER SUPPLY when EMC test is performed.

evidence.claim: The manufacturer-provided program operates normally when connected to the power supply.
evidence.evidenceText: When connected to POWER SUPPLY, program provided by manufacturer is operated normally.

evidence.claim: Dark image acquisition using Acquisition Software is the monitoring method for evaluation criteria.
evidence.evidenceText: When acquiring a Dark image using Acquisition Software in the evaluation of the following criteria, there should be no problem with the image.

evidence.claim: CISPR 11 conducted emission and radiated emission tests are recorded as PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: CISPR 11 Conducted Emission on AC mains Port PASS Radiated Emission PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission on AC mains input port is recorded as PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-3-2 Harmonic Current Emission on AC Mains Input Port PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-3-3 voltage fluctuations and flicker on AC mains input port is recorded as PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-3-3 Voltage Fluctuations and Flicker on AC Mains Input Port PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-4-2 electrostatic discharge immunity is recorded as PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-4-2 Electrostatic Discharge Immunity PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-4-3 radio-frequency electromagnetic field amplitude modulated immunity is recorded as PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-4-3 Radio-frequency electromagnetic field Amplitude modulated Immunity PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-4-4 fast transients immunity is recorded as PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-4-4 Fast Transients Immunity PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-4-5 surges immunity is recorded as PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-4-5 Surges Immunity PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-4-6 radio-frequency common mode immunity is recorded as PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-4-6 Radio-frequency common mode Immunity PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-4-8 power frequency magnetic fields is recorded as PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-4-8 Power frequency magnetic fields PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-4-11 voltage dips and voltage interruptions immunity is recorded as PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-4-11 Voltage Dips, Voltage Interruptions Immunity PASS

evidence.claim: For immunity tests, essential performance and basic safety shall not be affected before, during, and after the test; performance degradation not affecting them is PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: Before, during, and after the test, the essential performance and basic safety shall not be affected, and the performance degradation which does not affect essential performance and basic safety is PASS.

evidence.claim: Specific detailed immunity pass/fail criteria shall be based on applicable part two standards or risk management and included in the risk management file.
evidence.evidenceText: Specific, detailed immunity pass/fail criteria, shall be based on applicable part two standards or risk management, for immunity with regard to em disturbances. These pass/fail criteria shall be included in the risk management file

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is not stated in the document text; source path suggests CE MDD but the extracted authority field is left empty to avoid inventing unsupported metadata.
Product model signals appear in metadata and source path, while the document text primarily names ADD as the product.
OCR/text extraction quality issue: 'Voltage Dips and Interruptions' appears as 'ltage Dips and Interruptions' in the pass/fail criteria section.
